rationale: Acting on Review 1 yields the better PR: its class renames (AffineAlgGroup→IsAffineAlgGroup etc. at lines 29/63/68) align with Mathlib's Is* convention for Prop classes (explicitly used for IsAlgClosed/IsUnipotent in the same diff) and are material naming fixes, as are its lemma/field overstatement/AlgPoints findings; Review 2 only catches case-style inconsistencies (also real but lower-impact) plus the shared lemma. Confirmed directly in the shown diff.
